subcodes.first_line: O ye two faithful servants of the Blessed Beauty! Your letter hath been received, yet after Jináb-i-Jamshíd-i-Dáráb [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده صادق جمال مبارک نامه شما رسید ولی بعد از آنکه جناب جمشید داراب و
subcodes.subjects: @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
